title: verbascum × ramigerum subsp. denudatum
intro: Verbascum × ramigerum subsp. denudatum, also known as Mullein, is a biennial plant species native to Europe and Western Asia. It has been used for centuries in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and expectorant effects. The health benefits of Mullein include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as soothing skin irritations and wounds. Mullein can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and salves, making it a versatile and accessible remedy for various health concerns.
